debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
hr : r ≥ 0
⊢ HasFiniteIntegral (Φ₅ r) (volume.restrict (Ioc 0 1))

failed_attempts:
simpa [HasFiniteIntegral] using
    (intervalIntegral.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const (f := Φ₅ r) (a := (0 : ℝ)) (b := 1)
      (C := ‖(0 : ℝ)‖ + 1) (by
        intro x hx
        have hx' : x ∈ Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
        have : ‖Φ₅ r x‖ ≤ ‖(0 : ℝ)‖ + 1 := by
          have hcont : ContinuousOn (Φ₅ r) (Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1) :=
            Φ₅_contDiffOn.continuousOn
          have hbounded :
              BddAbove ((fun x => ‖Φ₅ r x‖) '' (Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1)) := by
            simpa using (hcont.norm.bddAbove_image (by
              simpa [isCompact_Icc] using (isCompact_Icc : IsCompact (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1))))
          rcases hbounded with ⟨M, hM⟩
          have : ‖Φ₅ r x‖ ≤ max M (‖(0 : ℝ)‖ + 1) := by
            have : ‖Φ₅ r x‖ ∈ (fun x => ‖Φ₅ r x‖) '' (Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1) := ⟨x, hx', rfl⟩
            exact le_trans (hM this) (le_max_left _ _)
          exact le_trans this (le_max_right _ _)
        simpa using this))

simpa [hasFiniteIntegral_iff_norm] using
    (intervalIntegral.hasFiniteIntegral_of_bounded (f := fun z => Φ₅ r z)
      (a := (0 : ℝ)) (b := (1 : ℝ))
      (Φ₅_contDiffOn.continuousOn.norm.comp_continuousOn ?_) ?_ ?_)
simpa [IntegrableOn, integrableOn_subtype] using Φ₅_hasFiniteIntegral (r := r) hr

have hcont : ContinuousOn (Φ₅ r) (Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1) :=
    Φ₅_contDiffOn.continuousOn
  have hbound : ∃ C, ∀ x ∈ Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1, ‖Φ₅ r x‖ ≤ C := by
    simpa [Metric.isCompact_iff_isClosed_bounded] using
      (isCompact_Icc.continuousOn_norm.comp_continuousOn
        (hcont.mono (by intro x hx; exact ⟨le_of_lt hx.1, hx.2⟩))).bddAbove_range
  rcases hbound with ⟨C, hC⟩
  have : AEStronglyMeasurable (Φ₅ r) (volume.restrict (Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1)) :=
    (ContinuousOn.aestronglyMeasurable hcont measurableSet_Ioc)
  refine hasFiniteIntegral_of_bounded ?_ this
  · refine ⟨C, ?_⟩
    intro x hx
    exact hC x hx
simpa [volume_eq_add HaarMeasure.add, hr] using Φ₅_hasFiniteIntegralOn (r := r) hr

simpa [Measure.restrict_restrict, inter_assoc, inter_comm, inter_left_comm] using
    (Φ₅_hasFiniteIntegral hr)
